name: Dina Pierson NMLS 195695- Supreme Lending
description_short: Dallas-based mortgage loan officer offering conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, jumbo, and construction loans with 20+ years of experience and bilingual support.
description_long:
Dina Pierson is a mortgage loan officer (NMLS #195695) operating under Supreme Lending with a physical office location at 12160 Abrams Rd., Suite 411 in Dallas, TX. She leads a team with over 20 years of combined experience in residential mortgage lending across Texas. The company positions itself as a full-service mortgage provider serving homebuyers, refinancers, and those exploring government-backed assistance programs.

Dina Pierson's team offers a comprehensive range of loan products including conventional mortgages (3% down), FHA loans (3.5% down for first-time buyers), VA loans (100% financing for eligible veterans), USDA loans (0% down for rural properties), jumbo loans for luxury properties, condo-specific financing, and one-time close construction loans up to $1.5 million. They provide both fixed-rate and adjustable-rate options across most programs, with flexible terms and competitive positioning on interest rates.

The practice distinguishes itself through bilingual service (English and Spanish), which addresses a significant demographic need in the Dallas market. Their emphasis on "clear communication, honest advice, and fast, friendly service" and claim of helping "hundreds of families across Texas" suggests an established local reputation. The team structure and 20+ year tenure indicates operational stability and experience navigating various market cycles.

As with all mortgage lenders, borrowers should understand that loan approval depends on credit scores, debt-to-income ratios, property appraisals, and other underwriting standards that vary by program. The website content does not provide specific interest rates, APRs, or fee structures, which are essential variables for comparing this lender to competitors. Prospective borrowers should request Loan Estimates under TRID rules before committing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers 100% financing VA loans with no down payment requirement for eligible veterans and active-duty personnel
USDA program available with 0% down payment for qualified rural properties with reduced closing costs
Bilingual team (English and Spanish) providing accessibility to broader Dallas demographic
Wide product range covering conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, jumbo, condo, and construction loans in one place
One-time close construction loans up to $1.5 million with interest-only payments during build phase
Conventional loans available with 3% down payment for homebuyers with minimum 620 credit score
20+ years of team experience and established presence as part of Supreme Lending network
cons: Website does not disclose current interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules for rate comparison
No information provided about loan processing timelines or average closing periods
Limited transparency on credit score requirements for VA and jumbo loan products
No mention of customer reviews, complaints, or third-party ratings (BBB, Google, etc.)
Website does not specify which loan programs are available for refinancing versus purchase-only
best_for: First-time homebuyers seeking FHA loans with lower down payments and credit score flexibility
Military veterans and active-duty personnel pursuing VA loans with 100% financing and no PMI
Rural property buyers eligible for USDA loans seeking zero-down financing options
Spanish-speaking borrowers in the Dallas area needing bilingual mortgage guidance
diagnosis: Best for Dallas-area borrowers seeking diverse loan options with bilingual support and local expertise, particularly military members, first-time buyers, and rural property purchasers. Primary caveat: website lacks current rate quotes, fee transparency, and customer satisfaction data necessary for informed lender comparison—prospective borrowers must request detailed Loan Estimates directly.
services: Conventional mortgage loans with fixed and adjustable rates, 3% minimum down
FHA loans for first-time and repeat homebuyers with 3.5% minimum down
VA loans with 100% financing for eligible military veterans and active-duty personnel
USDA loans with 0% down for rural properties in USDA-designated areas
Jumbo loans for luxury, primary, second, and vacation homes
Condo-specific financing with dedicated loan specialists
One-time close construction loans up to $1.5 million with 6, 9, or 12-month terms
Mortgage refinancing services for existing homeowners
Bilingual loan counseling and support in English and Spanish
Wide range of repayment term options across most loan products
Adjustable-rate mortgage (ARM) options across multiple programs
Gift fund acceptance for down payments on qualifying programs
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
